info.title: Nexora CRM360 — Mock APIs
info.description:
Complete mock API collection for Nexora CRM360 development.

Covers: MSG91 WhatsApp, MSG91 SMS, Fast2SMS, TeleCMI Voice, Resend Email, and AI Services.

Setup: Import → Create Mock Server → Copy URL → Paste in Settings → Integrations → Postman.

Let me check. I see it's in transit, expected by tomorrow.

text.example: Great question! For a team of 15, our Pro plan at ₹999/user/month would be perfect. It includes unlimited contacts, WhatsApp integration, and advanced analytics. Shall I share the detailed pricing?

suggestions.text: Great question! For a team of 15, our Pro plan at ₹999/user/month would be perfect. It includes unlimited contacts, WhatsApp integration, and advanced analytics. Shall I share the detailed pricing?
Hi! We have a Business plan starting at ₹799/user/month and a Pro plan at ₹999/user/month. For 15 users, I'd recommend Pro — it includes everything your team needs. Want me to set up a demo?
We offer competitive team pricing! For 15 users on our Pro plan, we can offer a 10% volume discount bringing it to ₹899/user/month. This includes full CRM, marketing automation, and priority support.
